items.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
items.summary: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Microsoft’s DLSS competitor is now available on the Xbox Ally X handheld
items.summary: Microsoft is starting to test its Automatic Super Resolution (Auto SR) feature with the Xbox Ally X. Auto SR first debuted on some Copilot Plus PCs nearly two years ago, improvi...
